title: xBD: Building Damage Assessment from Satellite Imagery
description: Building damage assessment from pre- and post-disaster satellite imagery. Annotators compare side-by-side satellite images to classify damage severity using the Joint Damage Scale, identify building types, and note specific damage features visible in the imagery. Based on the xBD dataset for disaster response and recovery.

author.name: Gupta et al.
author.affiliation: Carnegie Mellon University / Defense Innovation Unit

citation:
